name: siyuan
description: SiYuan Note API for searching, reading, creating, and managing blocks and documents in a self-hosted knowledge base via curl.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 siyuan 相關工作
幫我啟用 siyuan 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 siyuan

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the siyuan skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
